_comment: pt.20 — per-role/tier dispatch routing for Opus 4.8 (effort + thinking + native budget). Consumed by scripts/bridge_dispatch.py, which sets FACTORY_CLAUDE_EFFORT / FACTORY_CLAUDE_MAX_THINKING_TOKENS / FACTORY_CLAUDE_MAX_BUDGET_USD per dispatch; the provider (claude_code_cli.py) passes them to `claude`. DEFAULT OFF: only applied when env FACTORY_DISPATCH_PROFILES=1 (or --dispatch-profiles), because routing hard->effort=max may re-enable extended thinking and re-trigger the pt.15 multi-turn thinking-400 bug — must pass one supervised hard dispatch before going live.
_resolution_order: by_role (most specific) overrides by_tier overrides default
